channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2024
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: YouTube has a new plan to combat clickbait
item.description: Thumbnails play the YouTube equivalent of a movie poster, aiming to draw your attention to click and watch when you have hundreds of videos clogging your recommended content.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Le tecnologie di frontiera del 2025: le previsioni degli analisti e la visione dei CIO
item.description: Se l’AI è la tecnologia del decennio, all’orizzonte si profila una rivoluzione tecnologica altrettanto dirompente: il calcolo quantistico.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: Finland’s prime minister says authorities are investigating an interruption in a power cable under the Baltic Sea between his country and Estonia.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AI use cases are going to get even bigger in 2025
item.description: Over the past two years, generative AI has dominated tech conversations and media headlines. Tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney, and Sora captured imaginations with their ability to create text, images, and videos, sparking both excitement and ethical debates.
item.dc:creator: Kolawole Samuel Adebayo, Fast Company

item.title: Fake AI-generated reviews are all over the internet, research shows
item.description: The emergence of generative artificial intelligence tools that allow people to efficiently produce novel and detailed online reviews with almost no work has put merchants, service providers and consumers in uncharted territory, watchdog groups and researchers say.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Banning Chinese-made drones could hurt some Americans
item.description: Russell Hedrick, a North Carolina farmer, flies drones to spray fertilizers on his corn, soybean and wheat fields at a fraction of what it would cost him to use a conventional ground spreader.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Scammers exploited mom’s fears to steal her entire life's savings
item.description: Rising elder scams: How to recognize them and protect yourself and your loved ones. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you outsmart the scammers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How generative AI could aid Kubernetes operations
item.description: Enterprises often encounter friction using Kubernetes (K8s for short) at scale to orchestrate large swaths of containers, not to mention an escalating number of clusters. And due to its complexity, diagnosing issues within Kubernetes isn’t all that easy.
item.dc:creator: Info World
